<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v3/installmentProgramsOffers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Calculate installment programs offer according to specified input

feature | supported by resource
--- | ---
[paging](#header-paging) | no
[sorting](#header-sorting) | no

  parameters={undefined}
>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product set code, this will limit further calculations. If not provided, default productSet will be used."},"price":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (133000 represents 1330) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Order price"},"downPayment":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Down payment amount (default is 0, amount should be rounded to hundreds)"}},"required":["price"],"example":{"productSetCode":"COCHCONL","price":{"amount":133000,"currency":"CZK"},"downPayment":{"amount":0,"currency":"CZK"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Installment programs collection","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"installmentPrograms":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Installment program product code"},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["MINIMAL","FAVOURITE","OTHER"],"description":"DEPRECATED. Do not use this attribute, use attribute `flags` instead. Attribute `type` remains in the API for backward compatibility"},"flags":{"type":"array","description":"Installment program flag. Multiple flags for one program are allowed.","items":{}},"installment":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (250000 represents 2500 CZK/EUR) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"monthly installment amount"},"numberOfInstallments":{"type":"number","description":"installment count"}},"required":["productCode"]},"description":"Array with installment programs offer"}},"required":["installmentPrograms"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"installmentPrograms":[{"productCode":"COCONL06","type":"MINIMAL","flags":[{"type":"MINIMAL","delayFirstInstallment":2,"benefit":"TURBO"}],"installment":{"amount":221900,"currency":"CZK"},"numberOfInstallments":6}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"    Error in processing request","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","description":"JSON path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","description":"Internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"required":["code","message","severity"]},"description":"Array with errors"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
